steps.text: Pick your starter Pokemon from the box (Tepig / Oshawott / Snivy)
Battle Bianca, then battle Cheren
Go downstairs - your mom gives you an Xtransceiver
Exit house. Go to house SW and talk to Bianca. Exit. Go NW and talk to Cheren
Enter the laboratory - Professor Juniper gives you a Pokedex (say yes to her 2nd question)
Exit the lab - your mom gives you a Town Map. Head NE to Route 1
Go north - Professor Juniper gives you x5 Pokeball
Go north - talk to the girl in the grass for a Potion
Go north and talk to Bianca. Say yes and continue north to Accumula Town

catches.name: Lillipup
catches.why: Evolves into Stoutland - Pickup ability for passive items

steps.text: Go east to the Pokecenter and talk to Professor Juniper. Heal your Pokemon and exit
Go west and talk to Cheren. Battle N
Go in the house NW of town. 2nd floor - talk to a guy for a Pokeball. Exit and go west to Route 2
Go west - your mom gives you Running Shoes
Follow the path, pick a Potion in the grass. Fight a trainer
Avoid all other trainers. Go up stairs to the right for a Potion
Also get a Pokeball. Go down stairs, head north. Battle Bianca. Go north to Striaton City

catches.name: Purrloin
catches.why: Dark-type, decent early game

steps.text: Go west to pick up X Speed
Enter first house - get Great Ball from first guy you see
Exit house. Go SE - get Dusk Ball from guy in black
Go in house NW of city, talk to guy south of Cheren
Say: yes > antidote > awakening to get Full Heal
Talk to Cheren, say yes 2x. Beat Cheren - get x3 Oran Berry. Exit house
Go east from Pokecenter, enter the gym. Gym guide gives Fresh Water
Stand on the Pokemon type super effective to the type on the wall

tips: Stand on the Pokemon type super effective to the type on the wall

steps.text: Go north, beat 2 trainers. Beat Gym Leader - get TM Work Up

gym: Beat Gym Leader - get TM Work Up

steps.text: Exit gym - Fennel gives you HM Cut
Make room in your party - you can get a free gift Pokemon in the next area!

tips: Make room in your party - you can get a free gift Pokemon in the next area!

steps.text: Go NE of city to enter Dreamyard

catches.name: Basculin
catches.why: Post-game only - decent water type

steps.text: Go east, fight 2 trainers. Talk to girl all the way east, say yes for a free Pokemon
Go NE to pick X Defend
Go west, cut the tree. Go north, fight 2 Plasma members
Go west - get Pokeball in grass. Go east and up stairs. Go west for Dream Ball
Go east for Repel. Go down stairs. Go south for Paralyze Heal
Run back to Striaton City

catches.name: Munna
catches.why: Teleport mon alternative for Unova - fast PC returns

catches.name: Musharna
catches.why: Already evolved Teleport user

catches.name: Roggenrola
catches.why: Sturdy + Stealth Rock lead potential

steps.text: Go in house south of gym, 2nd floor - talk to Fennel for C-Gear (say yes 2x). Also get Pal Pad
Exit house. Go NW to fountain. Go south for Pokeball. Go north to Route 3

catches.name: Basculin
catches.why: Post-game only - decent water type

steps.text: Go north, fight the twins. House north of twins has a girl that heals your Pokemon
Go west from house, fight a trainer. Go west for hidden Great Ball in sandbox
Go back to twins, go west. Fight Cheren. Get Potion in grass
Go west all the way, talk to Cheren. Say yes, enter Wellspring Cave. Battle Plasma members with Cheren
Exit cave. Go east for Repel in grass (avoid trainer). Talk to Bianca - get x3 Heal Ball
Go south for Antidote in grass (avoid trainer). Avoid all trainers
Get Pokeball in grass south of bridge. Go west for Awakening in grass
Go west to Nacrene City

catches.name: Blitzle
catches.why: Fast Electric-type, good early game sweeper

catches.name: Pidove
catches.why: Fly user - evolves into Unfezant

catches.name: Tepig
catches.why: Starter in the wild! Fire-type if you didn't pick one

steps.text: Go west - Cheren gives x3 Chesto Berry
Go west all the way - hidden Revive in train tracks
Go in house SW of city, stand near ace trainer. She gives 1 of 3 items:• Say Tepig = Charcoal• Say Oshawott = Mystic Water• Say Snivy = Miracle Seed
Optional: House east of Pokecenter - trade Petilil for Cottonee (girl up north)

tips: Optional: House east of Pokecenter - trade Petilil for Cottonee (girl up north)

steps.text: House NW of city - girl gives Soda Pop (Wednesdays only)
Hidden Ultra Ball near guy with glasses
Go NE from Pokecenter, enter gym. Fight N first
Enter gym. First girl east can revive fossils. Go north, enter door. Gym guide gives Fresh Water
Read books in order: bottom-left > middle-left > top-left > bottom-right > middle-right

tips: Read books in order: bottom-left > middle-left > top-left > bottom-right > middle-right

steps.text: Go down stairs. Beat Gym Leader - get TM Retaliate

gym: Beat Gym Leader - get TM Retaliate

steps.text: Exit gym - Bianca gives Dowsing Machine. Go NW to Pinwheel Forest
Hidden Super Potion east of first girl. Talk to girl for HM Rock Smash
Pick Super Potion south (use Rock Smash to clear the rock)
Go south, avoid trainers. Go east from little girl for Pokeball. Go SW all the way for Potion
Go north - hidden Tiny Mushroom in water square. Go east for Antidote
Hidden Antidote in big water square. Go east and up stairs
If you have a Fighting-type in party, click the big rock for a Hard Stone
Go north, down next stairs for Net Ball. Go back to first girl, go west to next area
Go west, fight the twins. Go west, fight 2 Plasma members
From 2nd Plasma member, go south for Big Root
Go north, fight guy in red. Pick Potion. Go south - hidden Tiny Mushroom in grass
Go west, avoid trainer, fight guy in red. Pick Antidote. Fight another guy in red - hidden Tiny Mushroom in tree
Fight Plasma member. Pick Paralyze Heal, fight guy in red. Go SE for TM Grass Knot
Go back, go north to fight Plasma member. Get Dragon Skull + Moon Stone
Go east for Miracle Seed. Go north to Bridge Gate

catches.name: Cottonee
catches.why: TOP 25: Prankster ability! Tailwind + Memento for gym reruns. Key utility mon

catches.name: Timburr
catches.why: Evolves to Conkeldurr - strong Fighting-type for story

catches.name: Throh
catches.why: Fighting-type, no evolution needed

catches.name: Sawk
catches.why: Fighting-type, Sturdy ability useful

catches.name: Sewaddle
catches.why: Evolves to Leavanny - good Grass/Bug

catches.name: Venipede
catches.why: Evolves to Scolipede - Speed Boost is amazing

catches.name: Snivy
catches.why: Starter in the wild!

catches.name: Riolu
catches.why: Evolves to Lucario - top-tier Fighting/Steel

catches.name: Petilil
catches.why: Trade for Cottonee in Nacrene City

steps.text: Talk to hiker for Quick Claw. Follow path to Castelia City
Go south to next area. Talk to scientist for 1 stone:• Say Panpour = Water Stone• Say Pansear = Fire Stone• Say Pansage = Leaf Stone
Go back west. Go west then north. Enter building to your left
11th floor - talk to hiker for TM Rest. Exit building, go south
Go west, go north. Enter building to right. Clown gives 1 berry for showing a Pokemon type:Cheri / Chesto / Pecha / Rawst / Aspear Berry (pick one)

tips: Cheri / Chesto / Pecha / Rawst / Aspear Berry (pick one)

steps.text: Exit. Go south. Go west all the way, north. Enter gym to right. Go north
Talk to guy in green, say yes to battle him. Say yes again
Go south from guy in green (west side). Go south, talk to next guy in green, say yes to fight
Enter house to right - talk to NW guy for Lemonade
Exit, go south. Get TM Flash from guy in black. Go south 2 areas
Go south, say yes to guy in green to battle. Go north, east, south
Talk to gym leader. Enter building, go to 55th floor. Pick Super Potion
Fight all trainers. NE guy gives Exp. Share. Go to 47th floor
Avoid NW guy and first girl. Guy south of TV gives x3 Quick Ball + x3 Timer Ball

items: x3 Quick Ball + x3 Timer Ball

steps.text: Fight scientist. Pick Revive SW. SE scientist gives Scope Lens. Exit building
Go west all the way, north. Enter building to left. Talk to Plasma member, beat him, enter building
Go north, talk to Ghetsis. Get Yache Berry. Pick Smoke Ball. Exit
Enter the gym. Gym guide gives Fresh Water

Gym puzzle: Press switches in correct order - go N, E (fight trainer + switch), N (skip first switch), NE switch, W switch, NE switch, W switch, SW (skip switch), N switch, NE (fight trainer + switch)

tips: Gym puzzle: Press switches in correct order - go N, E (fight trainer + switch), N (skip first switch), NE switch, W switch, NE switch, W switch, SW (skip switch), N switch, NE (fight trainer + switch)

steps.text: Beat Gym Leader - get TM Struggle Bug. Exit gym

gym: Beat Gym Leader - get TM Struggle Bug

steps.text: Go north. Talk to middle guy in green for Amulet Coin. Go north
Enter building SE. Talk to guy in black near elevator, say yes. Go to 47th floor. Girl with brown hair gives TM Attract (sometimes bugged)

tips: (sometimes bugged)

steps.text: Exit building. Go north. Fight Bianca. Go north to Route 4
Pick X Accuracy. Go west then NW for Pokeball (avoid parasol girl)
East from parasol girl - hidden Great Ball. North for Super Potion
Go north (avoid trainer). Down stairs, up next stairs - hidden Burn Heal
Hidden Super Potion. North for TM Torment (avoid trainer). Back to parasol girl
Go east - house has a girl that heals. Fight Cheren east of house
Go north (avoid trainers), pick Burn Heal. West for Ether. NE for Potion
Hidden Super Potion near sign
Go north all the way - Professor Juniper gives x10 Ultra Ball. Go north to Nimbasa City

catches.name: Sandile
catches.why: TOP 25: Moxie ability! Evolves to Krookodile - EQ spam beast for PvM & raids

catches.name: Darumaka
catches.why: Evolves to Darmanitan - huge Fire attacker with Sheer Force

catches.name: Scraggy
catches.why: Evolves to Scrafty - bulky Fighting/Dark with Moxie

catches.name: Dwebble
catches.why: Sturdy + Stealth Rock + Shell Smash potential

catches.name: Sandshrew
catches.why: Ground-type, Sand Rush Excadrill budget option

catches.name: Sigilyph
catches.why: Psychic/Flying - Magic Guard ability is strong

steps.text: Go north, fight Plasma member. Get Bicycle
Try to enter first building for VS Recorder
Enter building. Go south, enter 4th train. Go east, take train to Anville Town
Follow path to 3 houses. Enter SE house - talk to guy for Rare Candy
Exit, go north - hidden Ultra Ball. Take train back to Nimbasa City
Go west and up stairs. Go north and up long stairs to exit building
Go west, enter house north of Pokecenter. 2nd floor - Sun Stone from ace trainer
Exit, go to house west. Get HM04 Strength from ace trainer. 2nd floor - Soothe Bell from old woman
Exit, go north all the way. Go east, talk to Bianca for Prop Case. NE girl gives TM Echoed Voice
Exit building, go east to Nimbasa Gate
Talk to baseball player for Macho Brace. Go west to Nimbasa City
Go south then east. Battle N
Hidden Super Repel SE. Go west for X Attack
Enter gym. Gym guide gives Fresh Water
Gym: Enter car right > battle trainer + switch > enter car > beat trainer + switch > enter car north > switch > enter car right

tips: Gym: Enter car right > battle trainer + switch > enter car > beat trainer + switch > enter car north > switch > enter car right

steps.text: Beat Gym Leader - get TM Volt Switch. Hit switch, enter car left. Exit gym

gym: Beat Gym Leader - get TM Volt Switch

steps.text: Go NW from Nimbasa City to Route 5
Go west. Battle Cheren
Go SW for Super Potion. NE for Pokeball (avoid trainer)
Go NW for Zinc. Avoid trainer, get Revive. Battle trainer SW. Go west to Driftveil City

catches.name: Minccino
catches.why: Evolves to Cinccino - Skill Link + Bullet Seed/Rock Blast

catches.name: Gothita
catches.why: Evolves to Gothitelle - Shadow Tag trapper

catches.name: Solosis
catches.why: Evolves to Reuniclus - Magic Guard + Trick Room

catches.name: Emolga
catches.why: Electric/Flying - cute and decent ingame

steps.text: Heal at Pokecenter. Get x3 Repeat Ball from girl NW
Optional: House SE of Pokecenter - trade Minccino for Basculin (guy in orange)

tips: Optional: House SE of Pokecenter - trade Minccino for Basculin (guy in orange)

steps.text: House west of Pokecenter - show a Pokemon move to girl for Heart Scale
Go in house south. Guy in black gives Expert Belt. Hidden Heart Scale near beauty girl
Go back in house from west side. Pick Pearl. Exit. Go south to Cold Storage
Go east - guy with orange helmet gives Rocky Helmet. Avoid trainers
Hidden Super Potion near ace trainer. Go west, south, east in grass for Ether
East for Protein in grass. Hidden Dive Ball in grass. SW all the way, north for Heart Scale
Enter building. Ice puzzle: Slide N (west side) > E > S for TM Scald
Then: N > W > N > E. Go E (avoid trainers). E > N > W > S

tips: Then: N > W > N > E. Go E (avoid trainers). E > N > W > S

steps.text: Fight trainer. Pick Ice Heal (avoid trainer). North (avoid trainer). Pick Super Potion
Go west. Enter cargo, fight 4 Plasma members. Pick Never-Melt Ice. Exit cargo
Go NW, south for Net Ball. Exit building. Go NE from Pokecenter to gym

catches.name: Vanillite
catches.why: Ice-type if you need one early

catches.name: Sneasel
catches.why: TOP 25: Evolves to Weavile with Razor Claw at night - Pickpocket farming & Ice/Dark attacker

steps.text: Gym guide gives Fresh Water. Get on elevator, go down
Go east, fight trainer. Elevator down. North all the way, west all the way. South, fight trainer. Elevator down
Elevator NW up. Fight trainer, next elevator down. Beat Gym Leader
Elevator up twice. Exit gym. Go NW of city. Battle Bianca - get HM Fly
Go north for Great Ball. Go west to Route 6
Go west, fight scientist. North, fight another scientist (avoid others)
Get Elixir in grass south of house. Super Potion west of house. Fight girl scientist
Optional: Show 4 forms of Deerling to scientist in house for Moon Stone (exit/enter after each)
West of house - 3 balls in grass. Only pick middle one for Leaf Stone (others are Foongus!)

tips: Only pick middle one

steps.text: Enter house east of hiker. Little girl gives Shiny Stone. Other girl heals. Exit
Go to hiker, north. Click spider web for TM Bulldoze. Enter cave

catches.name: Deerling
catches.why: 4 seasonal forms - show all 4 to Route 6 scientist for Moon Stone

catches.name: Karrablast
catches.why: Trade-evolves to Escavalier - good Bug/Steel

catches.name: Shelmet
catches.why: Trade-evolves to Accelgor - fast Bug

catches.name: Foongus
catches.why: Evolves to Amoonguss - Spore + Regenerator, great utility

steps.text: Go north. Professor Juniper gives Lucky Egg (small). Push crystal west. North, push crystal east. Get Paralyze Heal
East, fight scientist. South, push N crystal east. Get Revive. NW for Heal Ball
East, fight ace trainer. Hidden Elixir NE. South, push N crystal west, next crystal south
SE for Hyper Potion. Push crystal south, fight trainer. Push S crystal west for Iron
Down stairs. West, talk to twins for x2 Nugget. Hidden Paralyze Heal near stairs. Up stairs
South - hidden HP Up. Back to twins. NE - hidden Revive in wall near doctor. Beat doctor
NW for Timer Ball. North, fight Plasma members
After 5th Plasma: go SW for Thunder Stone
North, fight Plasma. West, down stairs
South, fight ace trainer. Push crystal east. East - hidden Paralyze Heal. North for Bright Powder
South, west (avoid ace trainer). Hyper Potion. Hidden Stardust in wall. South for Rare Candy
Back to Plasma. Fight last Plasma, go east. Up stairs. South, fight ace trainer
Get Magnet. West, fight scientist. East - fight N. East, exit cave

catches.name: Drilbur
catches.why: TOP 25: Ground-type powerhouse. Mold Breaker Excadrill for Mt. Silver XP farming

catches.name: Excadrill
catches.why: TOP 25: Already evolved! Sand Rush or Mold Breaker

catches.name: Joltik
catches.why: Evolves to Galvantula - Compound Eyes Thunder (91% acc!)

catches.name: Ferroseed
catches.why: Evolves to Ferrothorn - top wall, Stealth Rock + Leech Seed

catches.name: Klink
catches.why: Evolves to Klinklang - Steel-type Shift Gear sweeper

catches.name: Tynamo
catches.why: Evolves to Eelektross - Levitate, no weaknesses!

catches.name: Boldore
catches.why: TOP 25: Sturdy + Stealth Rock

catches.name: Metang
catches.why: Evolves to Metagross! Pseudo-legendary Steel/Psychic

steps.text: House NW of Pokecenter - girl in black gives Sharp Beak
Go south for TM Sky Drop. Go NE from Pokecenter to Route 7
Go west, up stairs. Talk to girl for TM Charge Beam. Avoid backpacker
Get Great Ball in grass (avoid trainers). Middle trainer looks N, far east trainer looks W

tips: Middle trainer looks N, far east trainer looks W

steps.text: Optional: House north - trade Boldore for Emolga

tips: Optional: House north - trade Boldore for Emolga

steps.text: East, fight ace trainer. North, avoid backpacker. Go in grass to avoid first guy in red
Fight next guy in red. East in grass for Ether. North to Celestial Tower

catches.name: Cubchoo
catches.why: Evolves to Beartic - Ice-type physical attacker

catches.name: Zebstrika
catches.why: Fast Electric-type, no evolution needed

steps.text: Up stairs. Avoid first 2 trainers, get Super Potion. Fight next 2, get TM Will-O-Wisp
Up stairs. Fight first trainer, avoid next. East, fight psychic trainer
Get Spell Tag. Up stairs (avoid others). Fight ace trainer W for TM Shadow Claw
Fight other ace trainer, get Revive. Up stairs. Ring the bell (say yes). Fly to Mistralton City

catches.name: Litwick
catches.why: TOP 25: Evolves to Chandelure with Dusk Stone - top special attacker for raids, Pumpkin Boss, PvM. Flash Fire/Infiltrator

catches.name: Elgyem
catches.why: Evolves to Beheeyem - Psychic-type, Analytic ability

catches.name: Murkrow
catches.why: Prankster! Alternative to Cottonee for gym reruns. Evolves to Honchkrow

catches.name: Drifloon
catches.why: Evolves to Drifblim - Ghost/Flying, Aftermath/Unburden

steps.text: Go NW all the way, enter gym. Gym guide gives Fresh Water
Cannon puzzle: N > W > E. Fight all trainers except 2nd. SE > W > N > E > W. Follow path

tips: Cannon puzzle: N > W > E. Fight all trainers except 2nd. SE > W > N > E > W. Follow path

steps.text: Beat Gym Leader - get TM Acrobatics

gym: Beat Gym Leader - get TM Acrobatics

steps.text: Cannon south, exit gym. House north of Pokecenter - talk to guy in orange. Exit
West all the way, south for TM Aerial Ace. Bald guy gives Spray Duck
Go south - hidden Paralyze Heal + hidden Repel. Go to Pokecenter. NE to Route 7
Follow path to 2nd backpacker. Go east - house has heal girl
East for TM X-Scissor (avoid trainer). North (avoid trainer). Hidden Ultra Ball in water
Fight Cheren - get HM Surf. North, enter cave

catches.name: Cubchoo
catches.why: Evolves to Beartic - Ice-type physical attacker

catches.name: Zebstrika
catches.why: Fast Electric-type, no evolution needed

steps.text: Follow path, enter door. North for Revive. Back, east for Full Heal
Enter door. East all the way. North, fight trainer. Enter door (avoid trainer)
North, enter door. Hidden Stardust in sand. East, fight trainer, pick Moon Stone
South, enter door. West, enter door (avoid trainer). North for Hyper Potion
Back, west on non-snow road for Ether. Enter door
North for Nugget. Hidden Revive in rock
SW - hidden Ether. North, fight trainer. Pick PP Up. East, enter door (avoid doctor)
Path splits by season - follow WINTER or SPRING/SUMMER/AUTUMN below

tips: Path splits by season - follow WINTER or SPRING/SUMMER/AUTUMN below

steps.text: WINTER: From doctor, go SE, enter door. N, enter door. NE for TM Flash Cannon. SW, enter doors south. East, enter door for Super Repel. West door. NE all the way - hidden Iron. Enter door, follow path, fight ace trainer. West for TM Spikes. East, N, enter doors east

SPRING/SUMMER/AUTUMN: From doctor, N, enter door. Fight hiker, enter N door. Fight trainer. West for Great Ball. South - hidden Protein in sand. Avoid trainer. South doors. Follow path to NE for TM Flash Cannon. SW, enter doors to east

catches.why: TOP 25: Sturdy + Stealth Rock lead

catches.why: TOP 25: Higher level than Chargestone Cave

catches.name: Cubchoo
catches.why: Ice-type option

catches.name: Cryogonal

steps.text: Next 4 items are WINTER ONLY: SE all the way, enter house. Girl gives Rage Candy Bar

tips: Next 4 items are WINTER ONLY:

steps.text: Exit. Hidden Tiny Mushroom x2
West of Pokecenter for Rare Candy (winter). Pokecenter - old woman gives TM Brick Break
East all the way - hidden Great Ball + hidden Timer Ball
House NW of Pokecenter - show guy a Pokemon that gained 25-49 levels for Exp. Share
Enter gym north. Gym guide gives Fresh Water
Ice gym: Slide N > E, fight trainer. Red switch > W, fight. E, fight. E > N > E > N, fight. S > E > slide W > N > N > W > slide S > W > N > E > N > E. Fight. Red switch > E > S > W > S > W > N

tips: Ice gym: Slide N > E, fight trainer. Red switch > W, fight. E, fight. E > N > E > N, fight. S > E > slide W > N > N > W > slide S > W > N > E > N > E. Fight. Red switch > E > S > W > S > W > N

steps.text: Beat Gym Leader - get TM Frost Breath. Slide west, exit gym. Go north to Dragonspiral Tower

gym: Beat Gym Leader - get TM Frost Breath

catches.name: Stunfisk
catches.why: Ground/Electric, unique typing

steps.text: Professor Juniper gives Old Gateau. Winter only: go west for Nugget. North to next area
Surf east, fight guy trainer. Get TM Embargo (avoid girl trainer)
Surf NW - hidden Heart Scale in wall. Surf west, enter tower
Follow path, up stairs. North for Super Potion. Up on pillar, west for Stardust
West to next area. Up stairs, jump south. All the way S, jump W 3x, jump N 3x
Jump E, jump N, jump E for Shiny Stone. Jump S 2x, E, S. All the way S
Jump W 3x, N. West, up stairs. Follow path for Dragon Fang
Up stairs. E all the way, N on bridge. W all the way, N on bridge
Pick Stardust. E all the way, S on 2 bridges. W for Stardust. E, N on 2 bridges
W, N on bridge. E all the way, S on bridge. W all the way, S on bridge
E all the way for Revive. W, S on bridge. W, up stairs
Follow path for Elixir. Up stairs. North, talk to N. Fly to Nimbasa City. SE to Route 4

catches.name: Golett

catches.name: Druddigon
catches.why: Dragon-type, no evolution, Sheer Force + Life Orb

catches.name: Mienfoo
catches.why: Evolves to Mienshao - fast Fighting-type, Regenerator

steps.text: Go west, avoid trainers. North to doctor area
Avoid doctor. West for Fire Stone (avoid trainers). North, fight guy in red. Hidden Stardust
West, avoid guy in red. SW all the way for TM Sand Tomb. NW all the way for Heart Scale
Hidden Ether near castle. SE for Super Potion. SE for Fresh Water (avoid trainer)
Avoid psychic. SE for Black Glasses. North - Soft Sand from guy in black
NE all the way - hidden Hyper Potion. West, enter Relic Castle
Avoid first psychic, go down in sand. Hidden Ether. Pick Revive. Up stairs
West, avoid 2nd psychic. Walk west carefully (don't fall in sand)
Talk to backpacker - choose Cover Fossil or Plume Fossil (pick 1)
Down stairs. East, fight Plasma. Down in sand. Hyper Potion, fight Plasma
West all the way, fight Plasma. TM Fire Spin. Down in sand. South, down in sand
Hidden Super Potion. North for Sun Stone. Up stairs 2x. South, drop in sand
Fight Plasma, get Revive. West, fight Plasma. Down in sand
Fight 2 Plasma, down in sand. Fly to Nacrene City

catches.name: Yamask
catches.why: Evolves to Cofagrigus - bulky Ghost, Mummy ability

catches.name: Larvesta

steps.text: Go NE to gym, say yes to get Dark Stone. Fly to Icirrus City. East, down stairs. North to Route 8
NW all the way, avoid guy in red. Get Poison Barb. East for TM Sludge Wave
East, get Super Potion (avoid girl trainer). North - hidden Hyper Potion near red trainer. Fight that trainer
East for Great Ball. North to Moor of Icirrus

NE for Elixir. Back to red guy, SE - hidden Big Mushroom
Non-winter only: South for Max Revive. Back to Route 8

steps.text: Door NE - get PP Up (avoid girl waitress). Up stairs, fight rich trainer
Up stairs, fight lady. West, avoid waiter. Guy with orange helmet - say yes for Thunder Stone
Exit building. Go east to Opelucid City
East, talk to Alder. Hidden Max Repel south of Pokecenter
House NW of Pokecenter, 2nd floor - football player gives Float Stone. Beauty girl gives Ring Target (say yes)
Exit. NW. House east of gym - beauty girl gives Destiny Knot
Hidden Ultra Ball. House NE - fight ace trainer. 2nd floor, fight another. Exit
NW, enter gym. Gym guide gives Fresh Water

gym: Beat Gym Leader - get TM Dragon Tail

steps.text: Professor Juniper gives Master Ball. Go NE to Route 10
North (avoid trainer). 3 balls in grass - only pick eastern one for Super Potion (others are Foongus)

tips: only pick eastern one

steps.text: East (avoid blue hair trainer). Fight next trainer. Fight Cheren - get x2 Max Revive
